data_mode_note: PROTOTYPE: Automotive uses real Signal data (2026-06-09) across all 8 themes; volumes/trends real, per-theme negativity & event severity estimated. Other 9 sectors are sample (seed:true). Regulatory items illustrative. Live pipeline replaces all. See pipeline/runbook.md.

events.title: 3,700 Waymo vehicles recalled over software issue
Subaru recalls nearly 70K vehicles over affected models
Toyota recalls 81K cars as dashboard failure hides safety alerts
Stellantis to recall 419,000 US vehicles over side air bag deployment
Ford recalls vehicles after roofs can detach at highway speeds
Regulator opens probe into grid-failure disclosures
Court orders major emitter to accelerate decarbonisation
Conduct authority fines lender over mis-sold products
Credential-stuffing wave hits mobile banking apps
Food brand recalls product over contamination
Agency flags safety signal for blockbuster therapy
Platform faces scrutiny over content-moderation rules
Consultancy faces audit-quality investigation
Retailer breach exposes customer payment data
Antitrust suit targets platform bundling practices
Zero-day exploit hits widely used enterprise stack
Safety regulator grounds fleet pending inspections

automotive.name: EU Battery Passport traceability mandate
automotive.summary: EV batteries require a digital passport covering provenance, carbon footprint and recyclability.

automotive.name: EU General Safety Regulation II — mandatory ADAS
automotive.summary: New driver-assistance systems become mandatory on all new vehicle types.

automotive.name: US NHTSA automatic emergency braking rule
automotive.summary: Phase-in deadline for AEB performance standards on light vehicles.

energy.name: EU methane-emissions monitoring rules
energy.summary: Mandatory leak-detection and reporting for upstream operators.

energy.name: Carbon border adjustment — definitive phase
energy.summary: Importers of carbon-intensive goods begin paying the adjustment in full.

finance.name: EU DORA supervisory testing milestone
finance.summary: Digital Operational Resilience Act testing requirements take effect.

finance.name: Basel III endgame — output floor step-up
finance.summary: Higher capital floors phase in, reshaping risk-weight modelling.

healthcare.name: EU Joint Clinical Assessment framework
healthcare.summary: Centralised health-technology assessment begins for new oncology and advanced therapies.

healthcare.name: US drug-pricing negotiation expansion
healthcare.summary: Additional high-spend therapeutics enter negotiated-price selection.

technology.name: EU AI Act — high-risk system obligations
technology.summary: High-risk AI providers must complete conformity assessments and maintain technical documentation.

technology.name: EU DMA interoperability requirements
technology.summary: Designated gatekeepers face expanded data-portability and interoperability duties.

fmcg.name: EU deforestation-free supply chain rule
fmcg.summary: Operators must prove key commodities are deforestation-free.

media.name: EU Digital Services Act audit cycle
media.summary: Large platforms face the next independent systemic-risk audit.

retail.name: EU supply-chain due-diligence duty
retail.summary: Larger retailers must identify and address adverse labour and environmental impacts.

professional_services.name: UK audit-market reform measures
professional_services.summary: Operational separation and resilience requirements for major audit firms.

travel.name: EU air passenger rights revision
travel.summary: Updated compensation thresholds and delay definitions for carriers.
